# Model: haiku
# Duration: 12.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Alex! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: No thanks 

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You have been unsubscribed from Shiftsmart messages. If you have questions for me, you can text START to this number at any time.
